# Summary Shape Spellings Fixture

## Overview

This fixture pins the both-spellings acceptance of the per-section
summary shape check. Three sections follow, one per accepted
spelling: the bold-prefix legacy form, the legacy sub-heading form,
and the current Summary sub-heading form. The runner asserts the
file yields zero summary-shape findings and zero blockers.

## Bold prefix legacy section

**TL;DR.** This section uses the legacy bold-prefix spelling and
must satisfy the summary-shape check without a finding.

The body prose here exists so the section reads as a normal shape
section rather than a bare heading.

### Decisions & invariants

- D-records: none, fixture material only.
- The legacy bold-prefix spelling stays accepted.

## Heading legacy section

### TL;DR

This section uses the legacy sub-heading spelling and must satisfy
the summary-shape check without a finding.

### Decisions & invariants

- D-records: none, fixture material only.
- The legacy sub-heading spelling stays accepted.

## Current form section

### Summary

This section uses the current Summary sub-heading spelling and must
satisfy the summary-shape check without a finding.

### Decisions & invariants

- D-records: none, fixture material only.
- The Summary sub-heading spelling is accepted.
